name: Portkeys PT6 5.2 Inch 4K HDMI Touchscreen Monitor
description: This monitor has a maximum brightness of 600 nits, perfect for shooting indoors or in a controlled studio environment.

features.Key Features :: 5.2" 1920 x 1080 Touchscreen Display | 3D LUT monitoring and 3D LUT HDMI output | 4K30 HDMI Input/1080p60 HDMI Output | False Color and ARRI False Color mode. | Large 178° viewing angle, and a 1500:1 contrast ratio | Framing guides, grids, aspects | Customized image crop to zoom in anywhere in the image | Weight 170g | Dimension 150.7 x 77.8 x 18.5mm
features.What's in the box?: 1x PT6 Monitor | 1x PT6 Sunshade | 1x HDMI to HDMI Cable | 1x Micro HDMI to HDMI Cable | 2x Pair of Rubber Covers | 1x MH-2 Mount | 1x Safety Box
